title: dontostemon tibeticus
intro: Dontostemon tibeticus, also known as Tibetan ginger or Tibetan angelica, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Dontostemon tibeticus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used as a raw ingredient in traditional Tibetan medicine.
